title: stipa pubiflora
intro: Stipa pubiflora, also known as Woolly Bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa pubiflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
